_note: Audit 2026-06 M0.5 baseline, ratcheted 2026-07 (A2-M2c). These counts may only stay flat or SHRINK. The guard (scripts/ci/check-baselines.mjs) fails CI on ANY drift: a metric ABOVE its baseline is a regression; a metric BELOW it is an unlocked gain. When you fix something, run `node scripts/ci/check-baselines.mjs --update` and commit this file in the same PR to lock the lower number in — so a count can never creep back up.
